fiction.title: THE NIGHT WE MET
fiction.author: Abby Jimenez
fiction.description: Larissa makes a choice after a concert to ride home with Chris’s best friend, which may cause life-changing results.

fiction.title: JUDGE STONE
fiction.author: Viola Davis and James Patterson
fiction.description: Judge Mary Stone oversees an ethically complex case in her courtroom in Union Springs, Ala.

fiction.title: THE CORRESPONDENT
fiction.author: Virginia Evans
fiction.description: Letters from someone she used to know push Sybil Van Antwerp toward revisiting her past and finding a way to forgive.

fiction.title: CARL'S DOOMSDAY SCENARIO
fiction.author: Matt Dinniman
fiction.description: The second book in the "Dungeon Crawler Carl" series. Carl and Donut confront an ancient spell and heightened dangers.

fiction.title: DAUGHTER OF EGYPT
fiction.author: Marie Benedict
fiction.description: The daughter of a prominent Egyptologist faces dangers as she searches for Hatshepsut’s secret tomb.

nonfiction.title: STRIPPED DOWN
nonfiction.author: Bunnie Xo
nonfiction.description: The host of the “Dumb Blonde Podcast” shares how redemption was an important part of her journey toward reaching her goals.

nonfiction.title: STAND
nonfiction.author: Cory Booker
nonfiction.description: The Democratic senator from New Jersey overviews our nation's struggles and divisions past and present, and shares his views on potential remedies.

nonfiction.title: STRANGERS
nonfiction.author: Belle Burden
nonfiction.description: Burden retraces her marriage of 20 years in search of clues to help shape her understanding about its demise and to find a way forward.

nonfiction.title: A WORLD APPEARS
nonfiction.author: Michael Pollan
nonfiction.description: The author of “This Is Your Mind on Plants” explores several perspectives on consciousness.

nonfiction.title: THE ANXIOUS GENERATION
nonfiction.author: Jonathan Haidt
nonfiction.description: A co-author of “The Coddling of the American Mind” looks at the mental health impacts that a phone-based life has on children.
